rationale: Both correctly validate the core delegated-vs-direct loader design split and independently surface the key latent gap — the untouched hunyuan_image3_transformer.py diffusion loader still calling the removed get_cache_scale API — with concrete file/line evidence, so gap_hit is true for both. Y additionally echoes more of the human reviewers' specific points (qwen2_old's getattr fallback being a safe no-op removal, explicitly recommending the regression test be kept, and probing whether fakes should be replaced with a real quant config) with tighter PR-time grep evidence and clearer major/minor tagging, giving it a slight edge in recall and actionability; precision is comparable since both sets of findings are grounded in the diff/repo rather than fabricated.
